issues.description: Trigger type is 'Trigger' (undefined); should be 'OnPlay' for Main Phase card
Actions are 'DrawCard' and 'TrashFromHand'; card text describes cost reduction and preventing activation. No matching actions present.
Missing actions: PowerBoost (with cost reduction modifier), Rest or custom action to prevent activation in next Refresh Phase. Current DSL has no relation to card effect.
